creator: andreask@fredhopper.com
text:
> The
> maintainer of net/net6 and devel/obby has been CC'ed on this but my
most
> recent attempt at communication with him has gone unanswered for a
month
> now. I am willing to take maintainership of net/net6 and devel/obby if
> these get a maintainer timeout.

I'm at the moment unable to handle freebsd port work, except through the
help of miwi@ (Thank you!), as I don't have any internet-connected
FreeBSD system ATM.

If you would like to take the maintainership for these ports, please do.
I'm sure you can be a better maintainer than I am ATM. :/

--
Andreas
